overall.description: First-person perspective from a ship's bridge navigating at night toward a harbor entrance with a visible lighthouse. The footage shows navigation equipment including radar and chart plotters, with the camera panning around the bridge interior. This is game engine footage from a ship simulator.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station forward view

agents.ego_description: operating the ship's navigation controls while approaching the harbor entrance

entered.detail: the forward deck of the vessel visible through the bridge windows, illuminated by deck lights
white lighthouse tower with light visible in the distance on the shoreline
circular radar screen showing yellow and orange navigation returns
rectangular electronic chart plotter showing map with yellow and blue colors
control panel with buttons and screens running along the left side of the bridge
screen suspended from ceiling displaying navigation data

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a stable forward view from the ship's bridge at night, approaching a harbor with a visible lighthouse in the distance. The navigation equipment including radar and chart plotters are prominently displayed, and the ship's bow deck is visible through the front windows.

events.description: camera begins panning right to view the starboard side of the bridge

agents.ego_description: panning the view to check the starboard side and monitor the ship's right flank

entered.detail: metal railing along the starboard side deck visible through side windows
large windows on the starboard side showing the dark water outside
control panels and monitors along the right side of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right to the starboard side of the bridge, revealing the side windows and railing while the forward view with the lighthouse exits the frame. The navigation displays shift position in the frame as the perspective changes.

events.description: camera pans back left toward the forward view
scene gradually fades to black as the video ends

agents.ego_description: returning the view to forward position while continuing to navigate the ship

entered.detail: forward deck of the vessel coming back into view as camera pans forward
lighthouse visible again in the distance as view returns to forward

segments.scene_description: The camera pans back to the forward view, bringing the ship's bow and distant lighthouse back into sight. The navigation screens return to their original positions in the frame. The video concludes with a gradual fade to black.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement within a ship's bridge at night, panning away from and then returning to a distant harbor entrance. It begins with a stable forward view of the ship's bow and a far-off lighthouse, with radar and chart plotters prominently displayed in the foreground. As the camera pans to the right, the forward vista and lighthouse exit the frame to reveal the starboard side windows and railings, causing the navigation displays to shift their position in the view. The perspective then swings back toward the front, bringing the bow and the guiding light of the lighthouse back into sight as the equipment returns to its original framing. The scene finally concludes as the view of the dark waters and bridge interior gradually fades to black.
